summary: Tested public/community cases with comments interaction feature. Backend: 11/14 tests passed (3 failed due to rate limiting 429, not bugs). Frontend: All UI features verified working - visibility selector in case creation, visibility badges in list/detail, author attribution for community cases, comment functionality.

design_issues.screen: Case Detail Dialog (both admin and resident)
issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (existing issue from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/casos with visibility=private creates private case - PASSED
POST /api/casos with visibility=community creates community case - PASSED
Default visibility is 'private' when not specified - PASSED
GET /api/casos as resident returns own cases + community cases ($or query) - PASSED
GET /api/casos as admin returns ALL cases regardless of visibility - PASSED
GET /api/casos/{id} allows resident to view community case they didn't create - PASSED
GET /api/casos/{id} blocks resident from viewing private case of another user (403) - PASSED
POST /api/casos/{id}/comments allows any resident to comment on community case - PASSED
POST /api/casos/{id}/comments blocks non-creator from commenting on private case (403) - PASSED
Creator can comment on their own private case - PASSED
Resident case creation form shows visibility selector (Privado/Comunitario) - VERIFIED
Case cards show visibility badge (Lock+Privado or Globe+Comunitario) - VERIFIED
Community cases show 'por {author_name}' in list - VERIFIED
Community case detail shows 'Reportado por: {name}' - VERIFIED
Comment thread visible and functional in case detail - VERIFIED
Admin Casos page shows visibility badges (Lock/Globe) - VERIFIED
Admin can add internal comments (checkbox present) - VERIFIED
Admin has status change buttons (5 statuses) - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All visibility and comments UI features verified

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test cases with visibility=private and visibility=community during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casos visibility and comments feature fully implemented and tested. Resident sees 21 cases (own + community), Admin sees 30 cases (all). Visibility selector works in create dialog. Badges show correctly in list and detail views. Comments work for community cases (any resident) and private cases (only creator+admin). Test data includes TEST_* prefixed cases with both visibility types.

frontend_ui.resident_cases_list: Shows visibility badges and author attribution - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.resident_case_detail: Shows visibility badge, comments, comment input - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.admin_cases_list: Shows visibility badges for all cases - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.admin_case_detail: Shows status buttons, comments, internal checkbox - VERIFIED

data_validation.visibility_badges: Both Privado and Comunitario badges present
